parameters.prompt:
Research trending tax topics and content opportunities for Tax4Us. Focus on:

1. Current tax law changes and updates
2. Seasonal tax topics (filing deadlines, deductions)
3. Industry trends and competitor content gaps
4. SEO opportunities with high search volume
5. Client pain points and common questions

Generate 5 content ideas with:
- Title
- Target keywords
- Content type (blog post, guide, FAQ)
- Target audience
- Estimated word count
- SEO potential score (1-10)
- Business value score (1-10)

Format as JSON array with these fields: title, keywords, contentType, targetAudience, wordCount, seoScore, businessValue, topic, status.

value.Title: ={{ $json.title }}
value.Notes: =AI Research Score: SEO {{ $json.seoScore }}/10, Business Value {{ $json.businessValue }}/10. Generated automatically by Content Intelligence Agent.
